title: Muslinz 6pk Luxury Bamboo/Organic Cotton Muslin Squares 70 cm - White
features: A parenting essential -pack of 6 luxurious bamboo organic squares - swaddling, burping, baby blanket, shielding when breastfeeding, nappy, changing mat cover or play mat

Made from 70% bamboo/ 30% organic cotton - luxuriously soft with the qualities of bamboo and the added strength of organic cotton, ultra- absorbent, hard wearing and wonderfully soft for you baby’s delicate skin
Premium quality – machine washable at 40c, quick drying, breathable and softer with every wash
Is & okeo-tex - Every product we sell has been ethically made to meet the highest quality standards, made in an is and okeo tex certified factory
description: Product Description Why Choose MuslinZ Soft & Lightweight Muslin cloths for baby made from 70% bamboo and 30% organic GOTS certified soft cotton—lightweight, breathable, and safe from birth. Ultra-absorbent Ultra-absorbent, durable muslin squares – perfect as a newborn reusable nappy, baby burp cloth, mopping up spills and so much more! Generous Size & Versatile Generous 70x70cm size— An all-in-one baby essential perfect for feeding, cleaning, changing, and soothing. A parenting must-have! Easy Care - Machine washable For best results, machine wash at 40°C and tumble dry on a low heat. Pre-wash before first use is recommended to maximise softness and absorbency. MuslinZ Exclusive Designs At MuslinZ, every print and product is thoughtfully designed by our Oxfordshire-based team, combining softness and style with the everyday practicality parents need. High-quality, ethical, affordable—MuslinZ is baby care you can trust. About us British Brand We’re proud to be a British brand dedicated to creating high-quality baby essentials. Founded in 2012 and based in Oxfordshire. Passion For Textiles We’re passionate about textiles and know how important it is for baby products to deliver on performance, safety, and softness. Sustainability At The Heart Sustainability is key at MuslinZ: local sourcing, sea freight, recyclable packaging, and conscious practices help reduce our carbon footprint. Made With Care Our ISO, Sedex & Oeko-Tex certified factories ensure products meet Oeko-Tex 100—safe, non-toxic & gentle for babies and the planet.
